title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves Two Dead
summary: A mass shooting at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in two fatalities and multiple injuries. Police are investigating a 'planned fight' as the cause.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence and its impact on community safety in North Carolina.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14, 2026, at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte, NC.
charlotte_impact: Showcases Charlotte's growing importance as a hub for polymer technology and manufacturing innovation.

title: Suspect Arrested in Stabbing of Pregnant Woman
summary: Police have apprehended a suspect with a criminal history in connection with the stabbing of a pregnant woman in a Charlotte grocery store parking lot.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about public safety and repeat offenders in the Charlotte-Mecklenburg area.

title: Repeat Offender Accused of Stabbing Pregnant Woman at Harris Teeter
summary: Marvina Butler-Hardy, a repeat offender, is accused of stabbing a pregnant woman in a Charlotte parking lot. She has nine prior convictions.
